data.name: Ana's Auto Fellatio
data.detailed_description:
⚙️ FEATURES

🔧 Fully Hand-Drawn Visuals
100% hand-drawn artwork, including UI, CGs, characters, environments, and props — all illustrated by the game’s lead artist.

🔧 Spicy Futanari CGs
Over 20 hand-drawn CGs with multiple variants, created by the game’s director and lead artist Nethuum, who has years of experience creating futanari art professionally.

🔧 Gallery & Bonus Content
Revisit unlocked CGs, portraits, and bonus artwork anytime.

🔧 Workshop & Job Simulator
Accept car repair jobs, clean and upgrade your workshop, buy tools, furniture, and manage your expenses to keep the business alive. Help clients with their cars… and if they’re lucky, provide a different kind of hands-on service.

🔧 Car Repair Mini-Games
Play 7 different repair mini-games, plus a memory mini-game that unlocks extra spicy CGs.

🔧 Progression & Perks
Level up Ana and unlock permanent perks that improve efficiency, earnings, and overall performance.

🔧 Character Customization
Unlock and equip 6 spicy outfits, each fitting different situations and mood.

🔧 Sandbox Gameplay
Choose how to spend your time — work, rest, shower, eat, or indulge in some self-care.

🔧 Roguelike Twists
Random benefits and modifiers add variety and replayability to each run.

🔧 Fully Voiced NSFW Audio
Explicit NSFW moans and sound effects during sex scenes, plus a fully voiced cinematic intro to enhance immersion.

🔧 Immersive Audio & Original Soundtrack
An original soundtrack composed exclusively for the game, setting the mood for both work and spicy moments.

🔧 4K Resolution Support
Enjoy crisp, high-quality visuals in up to 4K.

🔧 Achievements
A wide range of achievements for players who want to complete everything.

All CGs in this game are static illustrations with multiple variants. The game does not include fully animated CGs. Please consider this before purchasing.

data.short_description: Ana’s Auto Fellatio is a hand-drawn 2D adult mechanic simulator and visual novel starring the futanari protagonist Ana. Manage a car repair shop, take on repair jobs, level up with perks, unlock random benefits, enjoy erotic CGs, and balance business, time, and self-pleasure in a sandbox experience.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or Higher
  • 處理器: Dual Core or Higher
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 (AMD equiv.) or better
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: OpenGL 2 and/or DirectX 9

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.6 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 (AMD equiv.) or better
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: OpenGL 2 and/or DirectX 9

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Steam OS or Ubuntu 16.04
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 (AMD equiv.) or better
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: OpenGL 2 and/or DirectX 9
